version: 1.0
summary: Havikar is a food brand from Karnataka, India, dedicated to preserving traditional South Indian recipes. We offer 100% natural, healthy, and authentic Indian snacks, spice blends, and herbal drinks. Our products are sattvic, preservative-free, and crafted in small batches to ensure purity and nostalgic flavor. Key products include Antina Unde, Avalakki Chivda, Bisibelebath Powder, and Havishta vacuum-fried chips. Our mission is to bring the "Flavour of Life" from our kitchen to yours, blending heritage with modern health and hygiene standards.

sitemap: https://www.havikar.com/sitemap.xml
